fix.item: Fixed potential stylesheet loading issues on some Joomla installations
Fixed frontend rendering dependency on external plugin CSS file

change.item: Replaced external CSS loading with lightweight inline CSS rendering
Improved compatibility across Joomla 6 hosting environments
Improved reliability for production and high-traffic websites
Reduced risk of missing asset issues during installation and updates

security.item: Added GPL license notices required for Joomla Extensions Directory compliance
Improved extension packaging and JED submission readiness

note.item: This is a maintenance and stability release
Recommended update for all users of version 1.0.0, 1.0.1 and 1.0.2

addition.item: Added article tools rendering inside Joomla articles

change.item: Optimized for editorial and news websites
Designed to work without template overrides
Lightweight frontend rendering with minimal overhead

security.item: Added Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+ compatibility requirements

note.item: Initial public release for Joomla 6 websites
Always test on a staging environment before using in production
